title: Assistant Manager – Corporate Secretarial
metaDescription: Assistant Manager – Corporate Secretarial role in Singapore: manage a client portfolio, prepare resolutions and statutory filings, and advise on Companies Act compliance.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Assistant Manager to join our Corporate Secretarial Department in Singapore.
duties: Manage a portfolio of clients and handle the full spectrum of corporate secretarial matters.
Prepare directors' and shareholders' resolutions, minutes, and statutory filings.
Advise clients on compliance with the Companies Act and ACRA requirements.
Review work prepared by associates and provide guidance to junior team members.
Liaise with clients, directors, and regulatory authorities on governance matters.
requirements: Degree or ICSA / CGI qualification in Corporate Secretaryship or a related field.
4 – 5 years of relevant corporate secretarial experience.
Strong knowledge of the Companies Act and ACRA regulations.
Excellent communication and client management skills.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
